items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.lead_paragraph: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
